queries.question: Show both magicians who perform in Times Square, New York and mimes who perform there.
queries.sql:
SELECT Magicians.name
FROM Magicians
WHERE Magicians.Street_Location = "Times Square, New York"
UNION
SELECT Mimes.name
FROM Mimes
WHERE Mimes.Street_Location = "Times Square, New York"

queries.question: Show magicians and mimes who perform in Times Square, New York.
queries.sql:
SELECT Magicians.name
FROM Magicians
UNION
SELECT Mimes.name
FROM Mimes
WHERE Mimes.Street_Location = "Times Square, New York"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show magicians and mimes who perform in Times Square, New York.
